projects.name: autoresearch
projects.description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically

projects.name: deer-flow
projects.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

projects.name: gpt-researcher
projects.description: An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers

projects.name: deep-research
projects.description: An AI-powered research assistant that performs iterative, deep research on any topic by combining search engines, web scraping, and large language models.  The goal of this repo is to provide the simplest implementation of a deep research agent - e.g. an agent that can refine its research direction overtime and deep dive into a topic.

projects.name: DeepResearch
projects.description: Tongyi Deep Research, the Leading Open-source Deep Research Agent

projects.name: RD-Agent
projects.description: Research and development (R&D) is crucial for the enhancement of industrial productivity, especially in the AI era, where the core aspects of R&D are mainly focused on data and models. We are committed to automating these high-value generic R&D processes through R&D-Agent, which lets AI drive data-driven AI. 🔗https://aka.ms/RD-Agent-Tech-Report
